name: l3miage
description: Course for Genie Lociel in Paris Descartes

scripts.reveal:css: cat ./node_modules/reveal.js/dist/reveal.css | cleancss -O2 -o www/vendor/reveal.css && cat ./node_modules/reveal.js/dist/theme/night.css | perl -pe 's|\@import.*?;||g' | cleancss -O2 -o www/vendor/night.css && cat ./node_modules/reveal.js/dist/plugin/highlight/zenburn.css | cleancss -O2 -o www/vendor/zenburn.css
scripts.reveal:js: cp ./node_modules/marked/lib/marked.umd.js www/vendor/marked.js && cp ./node_modules/reveal.js/dist/plugin/markdown.js www/vendor/markdown.js && cp ./node_modules/reveal.js/dist/plugin/highlight.js www/vendor/highlight.js && cp ./node_modules/reveal.js/dist/reveal.js www/vendor/reveal.js
scripts.reveal: mkdir -p www/vendor && npm run reveal:css && npm run reveal:js
scripts.start: ALGOLIA_APP=H35CS6IJ9J ALGOLIA_KEY=${ALGOLIA_KEY} ALGOLIA_INDEX=l3miage viws-light -directory ./www/ -csp "default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' cdn.jsdelivr.net/algoliasearch/3/; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' *.algolia.net *.algolianet.com; frame-src www.youtube.com; child-src www.youtube.com" -env ALGOLIA_APP,ALGOLIA_KEY,ALGOLIA_INDEX
scripts.start-airgap: "${HOME}/code/viws/bin/viws-light" -directory ./www/ -csp "default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' cdn.jsdelivr.net/algoliasearch/3/; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' *.algolia.net *.algolianet.com; frame-src www.youtube.com; child-src www.youtube.com"

author: Vincent Boutour <bob@vibioh.fr>
